Purchase of Chemicals, Glasswares and Labwares for use of Institute on Annual Rate Contract Basis" < View > Date Extended upto 15-09-2025 Detailed Document < View > --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- NEW Tender enquiry for shredder < View > --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- corrigendum pertaining to the Mediclaim Policy < View > --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Tender Enquiry for Gold Medal Tender Document: < View > Due Date: 18/08/2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- NEW Second Amendment in Outsourcing of Manpower for Various Services Tender < View > NEW D ate Extend Notice above tender enquiry < View > Notice Inviting Tenders for " Outsourcing of manpower for various services " < View > AMENDMENT TO NIT No. Dir/Manpower/2025/617. dated 18/07/2025 Document: < View > AMENDMENT TO NIT No. Dir/Manpower/2025/386. dated O6/06/2025 Document: < View > -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- NOTICE FOR INVITING SEALED QUOTATIONS < View > Sealed quotations are hereby invited from eligible Vendors / Suppliers / Service Providers / Contractors for the Supply and Installation of Fabricated Grips for a 60-Ton Universal Testing Machine (UTM) located in the Structural Engineering Laboratory, CEAMD. These grips are required for the purpose of testing reinforcement bars of various sizes. NOTE: "Authorization Letter in favour of Director, SGSITS Indore must be enclosed with your quotes, without this the quotation will not be considered" Explore SGSITS Campus Map Photo Gallery SGSITS Anthem Quick Findings TEQIP RTI Anti Ragging Committee & Squad SGSITS Grievance Redressal & Feedback AICTE Feedback for Students & Faculty ICC(Internal Complaint Committee) Institute Discipline Committtee Student Counsellor IPR Cell Important Links Digital Initiative by MHRD Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Directorate of Technical Education All India Council for Technical Education University Grants Commission MPOnline CRISP INDIA Get In Touch Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology & Science Add: 23 Sir M.
